title: Remote Control Cars 3 4 5 6 7 8 Year old Boys, 360°Flips LED Flash Light Monster Truck Indoor Outdoor Toys for Kids Birthday Gifts
features: 【🦈LED Light Remote Control Car】Unlike other RC cars, we have fitted the body of the toy car with LED lights, so that it glows brightly during the day and night as the car is activated.
【🦈Unique Shark-Shaped Design】Featuring a cool shark monster look，With 360-degree rotation and 2.4GHz remote control settings, it brings endless fun to the kids as the wheels flip.

【🦈Convenient and Quick USB Charging】 The RC car is equipped with a 3.7V/500mAh battery that can be charged via the included USB cable.You can enjoy about 60 minutes of driving fun.Note that the remote control does not include batteries and requires 2 AA batteries.

【🎁Perfect for Gifts and Children's Toys】 Fun children's toys for ages 3 and up, packed in a colourful box, ready to send as a gift. Inside, kids and families can play together, and outside, kids can have exciting races together!
【📣Attention】Made of high-quality ABS materials that are non-toxic and environmentally friendly. If toy car does not respond, please restart the switch，Feel free to contact us with any questions.
